case_title: BROWN, CARNELLA G. vs. FREEMAN, SHIRLEY, IND/DBA THE FREEMAN SCHOOL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, CARNELLA G. AS TO DEFENDANT FREEMAN, SHIRLEY, IND/DBA THE FREEMAN SCHOOL
